# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write a Helm chart that includes an Ingress resource for our application. Configure the ingress to accept traffic from any hostname for flexibility across different environments (dev, staging, prod). We'll configure TLS certificates later when we move to production.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: my-application-ingress   # your ingress resource should be named as 'my-application-ingress' for this to work properly and ensure you have defined all necessary annotations such /annotations/{key}/value, e.g., nginx/class=nacoscloud in accordance with NGINXIngressController
  namespace: default            # set the ingress resource所在的namespace as 'default', replace it by your application's relevant namespaces when you move to production environment  
spec:
  tls:                          # TLS settings, make sure all necessary annotations are defined and checked according with NGINXIngressController. It usually includes certName & keyPairSecrets/name in nginx-ingress controller setting up as per configuration setup (default config)
    - hosts:                      # specify which host to use for ingresses that will be resolved by this Ingress resource, you can also add specific patterns if needed e.g., www.* or * .dev etc  and they should not exceed ~30 characters long in total sum per domain name configuration setup (default config)
          - myapp-staging.com   # specify your staging ingress here when moving to different environment such as dev, stagging by using this syntax e.g., host: 'myapp-dev' or multiple hosts like www.* for more flexibility and also limit the total characters of it (default config)
        tls:                       # TLS settings that are specifics related with your application deployment to ensure secure communications from clients connecting insecure connections, replace these details according NGINXIngressController setup if you have different configurations  ( default )  
          - secretName            # specify the name of certificates Secret where all necessary annotations and data like key/value pairs are defined e.g., nginx-ingress class=nginx , sslKey & sslCertificate in this section as per NGINXIngressController's setup (default config)
      default:                     # If no hosts match, use the following one by specifying a domain name  if you want to accept traffic from any hostname for flexibility across different environments e.g., * or specific names such myapp-dev . Replace this with your actual requirement in accordance NGINXIngressController setup (default config)
        tls:                       # TLS settings that are related specifically about the ingress resource and how clients will connect to server when using wildcard (*), you can also define these details like sslKey &sslCertificate if necessary.  replace with relevant values according NGINXIngressController setup (default config)
          - secretName:            # specify in which case all required annotations are defined e.g., nginx/class=nginx, host and paths should not exceed ~30 characters long sum per domain name configuration as well when using wildcard (*), the keyPairSecrets/{name}/value to be filled according with NGINXIngressController setup (default config)
